summary: Completed testing of Reminders page and Card Templates (Pacchetti Preimpostati) features. All features working correctly: Message templates CRUD, WhatsApp dialog, reminder reset endpoints, and card templates CRUD. 13/13 backend tests passed, all UI elements verified.

reminders_api: ✓ GET /api/reminders/tomorrow returns tomorrow appointments (0 in test env)
✓ GET /api/reminders/inactive-clients returns inactive clients (0 in test env)
reminders_page_ui: ✓ Reminders page loads at /reminders with data-testid='reminders-page'
✓ Template edit button opens dialog with name and text fields
✓ 'Appuntamenti di Domani' section shows (0/0 in test env)
✓ 'Clienti Inattivi' section shows (0/0 in test env)
cards_page_ui: ✓ Cards page loads at /cards with data-testid='prepaid-cards-page'
✓ 3 pre-created packages displayed: Card 5 Colori (€250), Abbonamento Mensile (€80), Card 10 Pieghe (€150)
✓ 'Assegna a Cliente' button opens new card dialog with pre-filled values
✓ Card name correctly pre-filled from package template
✓ Total value correctly pre-filled from package template
✓ 'Nuovo Pacchetto' button opens new package dialog
✓ Package dialog has all fields: name, type, value, services, duration
✓ Edit package dialog opens when clicking edit button

seed_data_creation: 3 card templates (packages) were pre-created via curl by main agent: Card 5 Colori, Abbonamento Mensile, Card 10 Pieghe. 2 default message templates auto-created on first GET.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All reminders and card templates features verified working. Reminders page at /reminders shows message templates section with CRUD, tomorrow appointments section, inactive clients section. Cards page at /cards shows 'Pacchetti Preimpostati' section with 3 packages. 'Assegna a Cliente' opens new card dialog with pre-filled values from template. All data-testid attributes correctly implemented.

reminders_page.whatsapp_integration_note: WhatsApp button opens wa.me link with pre-filled message - can't test window.open in automation
